title: Port Harcourt, Rivers — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Port Harcourt, Rivers: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Port Harcourt is a city in Rivers with a population of 2,100,000. Nigeria’s oil and gas capital, Port Harcourt is a major industrial city in the Niger Delta region.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
